creator: iss@mail.wbs.ne.jp
text:
"%man 1 strip" shows:

       -v
       --verbose
			Verbose output: list all object files modified.  In
			the case of archives, strip -V lists all members of
			the archive.

"strip -V" should be "strip -v".

Fix: I suggest to apply following patch.
How-To-Repeat: 
% man 1 strip
